acceptance_criteria_satisfied: Closest target selection considers non-station ships from both sides.
Planets, stations, and non-ship objects are ignored by seeker targeting.
Equal-distance target ties use automatic RNG through a narrow helper.
Initial facing can adjust up to three hexsides toward the selected target.
Per-hex movement turns at most one hexside and greedily reduces distance where possible.
Helpers can be tested without wx runtime.
Any new FHexMap helper remains generic and non-wx.

findings.summary: Stale TSM-004 placeholder comment in now-implemented resolveActiveSeekersForMovingPlayer().
All four test cases are source-inspection only; no behavioral exercise of targeting or movement logic with concrete inputs and outputs.
Dead negative-clamp guard (delta < -3) in adjustSeekerHeadingTowardTarget(); shortestHeadingDelta never returns values below -2.
